news.summary: In San Mateo, California, Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE) revealed that its Machine Learning application, Guidewire Predict, has been recognized as the "Embedded Analytics Solution of the Year" in the 2025 Data Breakthrough Awards. This software provides P&C insurers with advanced capabilities to enhance decision-making processes related to risk selection, pricing, and claims handling. The prestigious accolade was bestowed by Data Breakthrough, a respected market intelligence entity that identifies outstanding companies, technologies, and products worldwide.
news.headline: Guidewire's Predict wins "Embedded Analytics Solution of the Year" in 2025 Data Breakthrough Awards. #GWRE #PnCInsurers

This move underscores their consistent efforts towards social responsibility.

Stay informed with the NYSE Pre-market update for a competitive edge in trading.

news.summary: In an exciting partnership, AbbVie, a leader in biotherapeutic drug development and commercialization, has joined forces with ADARx, a company specializing in proprietary RNA technology. Their collaboration aims to propel the advancements of next-generation siRNA therapies in fields such as neuroscience, immunology, and oncology. The partnership announcement was made in North Chicago, Illinois and San Diego on May 14, 2025. This collaboration, blending AbbVie's expertise with ADARx's innovative technology, is expected to revolutionize these sectors and pave the way for groundbreaking treatments.
news.headline: AbbVie and ADARx partner to develop siRNA therapies in neuroscience, immunology, oncology. Collaboration to advance biotherapeutic drug development.

news.summary: Incheon National University researchers recently delved into the impact of domestic public opinion on foreign policy alignment amid the US-China strategic rivalry. The study, conducted in South Korea, focused on the credibility of alignment commitments. The results suggested that public sentiment plays a significant role in shaping these decisions. The researchers found that a considerable percentage of respondents believed that their government's alignment decisions were influenced by public opinion, highlighting the importance of domestic support in such matters. This study sheds light on the dynamic interplay between national public opinion and foreign policy choices in the context of global power dynamics.
news.headline: Incheon National University researchers study how US allies' foreign policy is shaped by public opinion amid strategic competition.

news.summary: Aiming to enhance behavioral health outcomes, particularly in underserved areas, grants ranging from $10,000 to $20,000 are being provided. Fidelis Care, a health plan serving over 2.4 million members statewide, is offering these grants in honor of Mental Health Awareness Month.

news.summary: Eastern Platinum Limited reported its financial results for the first quarter of 2025, showing a decrease in revenue to $14.8 million from $15.7 million in the same period in 2024. The mine operating loss increased to $4.7 million in Q1 2025 from a $5.3 million income in Q1 2024, resulting in a gross margin decrease from 33.7% to -31.6%. Operating loss was $8.1 million compared to $0.03 million in the previous year. Net loss attributable to equity shareholders was $6.9 million in Q1 2025 ($0.03 loss per share) versus $0.9 million ($0.00 loss per share) in Q1 2024, attributed to increased production costs due to the restart of underground operations at the Crocodile River Mine in South Africa. The company had a working capital deficit of $47.4 million as of March 31, 2025, with short-term cash resources of $4.7 million. CEO Wanjin Yang expressed optimism for future quarters with a focus on increasing production feed at the mine.
news.headline: Eastern Platinum Limited's Q1 2025 revenue decreased to $14.8 million, reporting a $0.9 million loss compared to Q1 2024. Operating loss was $8.1 million in Q1 2025. Net loss attributable to equity shareholders was $6.9 million in Q1 2025. Working capital deficit was $47.4 million. CEO aims to improve production results by increasing underground production feed.

news.summary: A well-known golf simulator company is currently offering franchise opportunities, providing a seasoned healthcare entrepreneur with the chance to establish their presence on Long Island. news.summary: Deere & Company, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker DE, is set to announce its second-quarter earnings before the market opens on Thursday, May 15. Analysts are predicting earnings of $5.64 per share for the Moline, Illinois-based company, a decrease from $8.53 per share reported in the same period last year. Revenue is expected to come in at $10.79 billion for this quarter, down from $13.61 billion in the prior year. Oppenheimer analyst Kristen Owen recently reaffirmed an Outperform rating on Deere and increased the price target from $510 to $513 on April 22. Investors are also keeping an eye on Deere's dividends, as the company currently offers an annual dividend yield of 1.30%, equivalent to a quarterly dividend of $1.62 per share ($6.48 annually). For more details, the full article is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Deere & Company is expected to report Q2 earnings of $5.64/share & quarterly revenue at $10.79B, with a $1.62/share dividend yield.

news.summary: A record-breaking contribution was recently made to the Foundation, marking it as the largest donation in its history and one of the most substantial in Sonoma County. This generous gift has paved the way for the establishment of the Hansel Family Care Center, which forms an integral part of the hospital's strategic growth to better serve the community. Notably, this donation serves as a tribute to the hospital's 75th anniversary. The announcement was made in Santa Rosa, California on May 14, 2025.

The integration was finalized on May 14, 2025, in Westfield Center, Ohio.

The rally in Nvidia and Tesla, along with Super Micro's soaring market performance, has garnered attention from investors and analysts. This trend suggests a favorable outlook for these companies and the market as a whole.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures up; Nvidia, Tesla rally. Super Micro soars with $20B AI deal.

news.summary: Economist Peter Schiff has raised concerns about the U.S. trade deficit, stating that without imposing high tariffs, the only effective way to reduce the deficit would be through a substantial devaluation of the U.S. dollar. Schiff noted that a slight drop in the dollar's value would not sufficiently address the deficit, and could instead worsen it by raising import costs. This scenario, according to Schiff, may result in heightened inflation and increased interest rates, posing significant economic challenges for the U.S. "Without significant tariffs, reducing the U.S. trade deficit heavily relies on a major dollar devaluation," said Schiff. The full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Peter Schiff warns that without high tariffs, only a major dollar decline can cut US trade deficit, leading to inflation and higher rates.

news.summary: Nominees for the American Music Awards and beloved figures in the music industry will be honored with a lavish display of gifts. news.headline: Distinctive Assets honors AMA nominees and industry icons with lavish swag in celebration of the healing power of music. LOS ANGELES, May 14, 2025.

The sex-positive brand surveyed more than 1000 adults this month, inquiring about their experiences with having sex dreams.
news.headline: Adam & Eve's annual sex survey asks 1000 adults if they've had a sex dream. Brand promotes sex-positive discussions.

news.summary: In the VIRAGE Phase 2b clinical trial, VCN-01 has successfully met primary efficacy and safety endpoints for treating Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma. This development marks a significant milestone in the study as the treatment demonstrated effectiveness and safety in the specified patient group. The positive results indicate promising outcomes, with a noteworthy achievement in targeting this particular form of cancer. The successful outcome of the trial highlights the potential of VCN-01 in addressing Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma, potentially offering new hope for patients battling this disease.
news.headline: Theriva™ Biologics' VCN-01 successful in pancreatic cancer trial achieving primary endpoints.

news.summary: Both parties have agreed to collaborate on a proof of concept (POC) project aimed at enhancing urban transit safety. The project will focus on the development and implementation of a precision curb detection system. The goal is to improve safety measures in urban areas by accurately detecting curbs to prevent accidents. This collaborative effort will bring together expertise from both sides to work towards achieving this important objective.
news.headline: Foresight and global automotive supplier team up for bus safety with 3D tech, focusing on precision curb detection.

news.summary: Teledigm Health and VirtuAlly have joined forces to provide extensive virtual nursing services to healthcare facilities in rural areas throughout the Midwest. The persistent shortage of nurses in the U.S. is significantly affecting rural healthcare systems. This partnership aims to address this issue and improve access to healthcare in these underserved regions. The collaboration was announced on May 14 in Charleston, S.C., and Lincoln, Neb. By leveraging virtual nursing solutions, they seek to bridge the gap and enhance medical services for residents in these areas.
news.headline: Teledigm Health and VirtuAlly partner to provide virtual nursing solutions to rural healthcare systems in the Midwest amid US nursing shortage.

news.summary: In Carlsbad, California, MaxLinear has introduced web-smart 2.5G Ethernet Switch SoCs that bring advanced capabilities for network management and optimization to HiSource's upcoming PoE switches. These SoCs support speeds of up to 2.5G, enabling efficient data transfer. This collaboration aims to enhance connectivity solutions with smart features, catering to the demands of modern networks for improved performance.
news.headline: MaxLinear's 2.5G Ethernet Switch SoCs power HiSource's Smart PoE switches, enabling network management.
